ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Date Re The $80,000.00 In Withheld Closing Costs
Off Calendar May-31-2006 Continued To Jun-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for Public Administrator. Counsel has received the authority from the tax accountant to release the withhold and he has directed the accountant to distribute the withhold. Court wants a statment on who gets what when funds are distributed. Matter is continued to 6/28. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
